title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at National Insurance Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at National Insurance Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
National Insurance Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About National Insurance Holdings Services:
National Insurance Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with National Insurance Holdings Services!
